2603.21296.title: DeepXplain: XAI-Guided Autonomous Defense Against Multi-Stage APT Campaigns
2603.21296.paper_summary: Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) are stealthy, multi-stage attacks that require adaptive and timely defense. While deep reinforcement learning (DRL) enables autonomous cyber defense, its decisions are often opaque and difficult to trust in operational environments. This paper presents DeepXplain, an explainable DRL framework for stage-aware APT defense. Building on our prior DeepStage model, DeepXplain integrates provenance-based graph learning, temporal stage estimation, and a unified XAI pipeline that provides structural, temporal, and policy-level explanations. Unlike post-hoc methods, explanation signals are incorporated directly into policy optimization through evidence alignment and confidence-aware reward shaping. To the best of our knowledge, DeepXplain is the first framework to integrate explanation signals into reinforcement learning for APT defense. Experiments in a realistic enterprise testbed show improvements in stage-weighted F1-score (0.887 to 0.915) and success rate (84.7% to 89.6%), along with higher explanation confidence (0.86), improved fidelity (0.79), and more compact explanations (0.31). These results demonstrate enhanced effectiveness and trustworthiness of autonomous cyber defense.
2603.21296.paper_summary_zh: 進階持續威脅（APTs）是隱秘的多階段攻擊，需採取適應性和及時的防禦。雖然深度強化學習（DRL）能實現自主的網路防禦，但其決策往往不透明，且在操作環境中難以信任。本文提出了DeepXplain，一種可解釋的DRL框架，用於階段感知的APT防禦。基於我們之前的DeepStage模型，DeepXplain整合了基於來源的圖學習、時間階段估計和統一的XAI管道，提供結構性、時間性和政策層面的解釋。與事後方法不同，解釋信號直接納入政策優化，通過證據對齊和信心感知的獎勵塑造。據我們所知，DeepXplain是第一個將解釋信號整合到APT防禦的強化學習框架。 在一個現實的企業測試平台上的實驗顯示，階段加權F1分數從0.887提高到0.915，成功率從84.7%提高到89.6%，同時解釋信心提高至0.86，保真度改善至0.79，解釋更加簡潔（0.31）。這些結果顯示出自主網路防禦的有效性和可信度得到了增強。
2603.21296.author: Trung V. Phan et.al.
